===Pokémon Diamond and Pearl Adventure!===
[[File:Elite Four DPA.png|thumb|200px|Lucian in Pokémon Diamond and Pearl Adventure!]]
Lucian made a brief appearance in ''[[DPA37|Gathering of the Legendary Pokémon!]]''. He watched [[Hareta]]'s {{si|Pokémon League}} battle with [[Koya]] in the audience.
